reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good for civil and rural students.

review_content.Placements: 60% of students are placed at our college. 6 Lacs per annum is the average package. TATA, JINDAL, and KALPATARU are the top recruiters. 70% of students got internships. Lots of students get jobs in their respective fields. But there is no playing field for students. P and C cycle teachers are too strict.
review_content.Infrastructure: Large classes and free all-time Wi-Fi are there. There are a lot of government hostels near our college. Teachers and staff are more creative with students. There are no lab instruments for EEE and EC students. Civil branch staff are like friends with respect to their field and classes.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Petroleum Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied whole heartedly.

review_content.Placements: No placements in our college. But the one passed out from the college are in a good position of tier respective companies. Up to my knowledge the lowest salary is 22000 and the highest is nearly 60 or 80 thousand. Coming to the internship, our college has good connections with big companies like IOCL, ONGC, BPCL and many more. Out of 50 students 30 will surely go for interns.
review_content.Infrastructure: Coming to the infrastructure our college is one of the best. It has a big play ground including foodball ground, shettle court and many more indoor games. Library is one of the best thing in our campus. It consists of each and every book either regarding to technical subjects or non technical. Labs are perfect Classrooms are perfect No idea about medical facility. The food in the canteen is bit disappointing but still satisfied with it.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: There are good faculty, good infrastructure with greenery.

review_content.Placements: Our college has less chances of placements. But from this year, we are having a lot of placements by various software companies. This year, we are doing final year project under TASK (Telangana academy for skills and knowledge). There are good placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have neat and clean classrooms with greenery around the college. There is no disturbance of traffic because the college is away from the city. We have football and cricket ground in front of the college. There is a hostel beside the college (1 km away). I didn't face any issue related to the infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Al-Habeeb College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: If you just want a degree, you can take admission as it worth the money.

content.Placements: None of the students from our course got placed because placements were not conducted by our college. After completion of your degree, you need to find any job or internship on your own as our college never help you to get any job. So, in this new era of technology, you need to choose a better college.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure in our college are average. You can do your project in the lab as almost every equipment was available for every lab project. But the faculty members were average as they could be, and there is no Wi-Fi facility. You can find every book which you need as per your syllabus in the library. Canteen and sports facilities are available here.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Never take admission in this college!

content.Placements: There were no placements for either of our seniors and their seniors and seniors before them. The only placements were available for petroleum branch that is for the students who passout in 2016. And in that placement only 5 students got selected.
content.Infrastructure: There arena't many facilities available for students. Wi-Fi is only available for staff members and not for students (but we hacked it anyways, we are CSE students tho) and there are labs with minimum facilities, classrooms are full, we have a good decent library but most of the books are not available when needed. No medical facilities, sports and games only happens once a year. And the canteen over here is the worst, they don't have quality food and the price is overpriced.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Petroleum Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied whole heartedly.

content.Placements: No placements in our college. But the one passed out from the college are in a good position of tier respective companies. Up to my knowledge the lowest salary is 22000 and the highest is nearly 60 or 80 thousand. Coming to the internship, our college has good connections with big companies like IOCL, ONGC, BPCL and many more. Out of 50 students 30 will surely go for interns.
content.Infrastructure: Coming to the infrastructure our college is one of the best. It has a big play ground including foodball ground, shettle court and many more indoor games. Library is one of the best thing in our campus. It consists of each and every book either regarding to technical subjects or non technical. Labs are perfect Classrooms are perfect No idea about medical facility. The food in the canteen is bit disappointing but still satisfied with it.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: There are good faculty, good infrastructure with greenery.

content.Placements: Our college has less chances of placements. But from this year, we are having a lot of placements by various software companies. This year, we are doing final year project under TASK (Telangana academy for skills and knowledge). There are good placements.
content.Infrastructure: We have neat and clean classrooms with greenery around the college. There is no disturbance of traffic because the college is away from the city. We have football and cricket ground in front of the college. There is a hostel beside the college (1 km away). I didn't face any issue related to the infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: This is the best review for engineering in Al-Habeeb college of engineering and technology.

content.Placements: This college is a good choice for the civil engineering because too many placements are available. Too many companies ( such as Infosys ) visited and offered 3 to 5 lacs per annum in Indian rupees. There is a placement cell available in the campus. Around, 30 to 55 percent of the students were selected by the companies visited the campus.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure but not maintaining it carefully. Fully Wi-Fi campus. The labs are well-maintained. The lab's equipment is also available in good quantity. The classroom, library, and the medical facilities are well-maintained by the college. The sports are conducted at the regular intervals. The hostel is not available in the college. I didn't face any infrastructure related issues during my tenure at the college.

admission_overview.college_name: Al-Habeeb College of Engineering and Technology Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: Al-Habeeb College of Engineering and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Al-Habeeb College of Engineering and Technology admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in streams includingEngineering and Business and Management Studies.Al-Habeeb College of Engineering and Technologyadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asGATE, APICET, and TS EAMCET. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 90,000 - 1,61,000for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses is 4 years.

courses_data.name: Al-Habeeb College of Engineering and Technology B.E. / B.Tech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: At the UG level,Al-Habeeb College of Engineering and Technologyoffers B.E. / B.Tech in full time mode. The programme is offered for a duration of 4 years. reviews.review_heading: If you just want a degree, you can take admission as it worth the money.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure in our college are average. You can do your project in the lab as almost every equipment was available for every lab project. But the faculty members were average as they could be, and there is no Wi-Fi facility. You can find every book which you need as per your syllabus in the library. Canteen and sports facilities are available here.

reviews.review_heading: Never take admission in this college!
reviews.review_text: There arena't many facilities available for students. Wi-Fi is only available for staff members and not for students (but we hacked it anyways, we are CSE students tho) and there are labs with minimum facilities, classrooms are full, we have a good decent library but most of the books are not available when needed. No medical facilities, sports and games only happens once a year. And the canteen over here is the worst, they don't have quality food and the price is overpriced.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied whole heartedly.
reviews.review_text:
Coming to the infrastructure our college is one of the best. It has a big play ground including foodball ground, shettle court and many more indoor games. Library is one of the best thing in our campus. It consists of each and every book either regarding to technical subjects or non technical. Labs are perfect
Classrooms are perfect
No idea about medical facility. The food in the canteen is bit disappointing but still satisfied with it.

reviews.review_heading: There are good faculty, good infrastructure with greenery.

I didn't face any infrastructure related issues during my tenure at the college.

There is a lot of greenery in the college.
There is no Wi-Fi in the campus.

4. There is big canteen with nutritious food.
5. Every there will be a fest, sport...

faqs.answer: AVS College Of Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

AVS College Of Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespecti

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because events and enjoyment in this college and the faculty are very friendly.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good at this college. The classrooms are good. Labs and libraries are average. The canteen food is good in quality. The food in the mess is average. Sports and games are average at this college. Medical facilities are also average. Wi-Fi is only provided in our college labs.

reviews.review_heading: The college environment and infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: Good college environment and infrastructure. Hostel and bus facilities are also good and convenient. Sports and games are also good. They give importance to sport activities and also conduct sports competition. Mess and canteen facilities are quality.

reviews.review_heading: They Provide Good Placement Opportunities for Us.
reviews.review_text: Yes, my department provides facilities such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. Hostel facilities are well-maintained, and food is available only during specific hours in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities in the hostel are not up to par, but sports and games facilities are excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and friendly faculty.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is great. The hostel rooms also have more space, and we have efficient cots. The food in the hostel is not great. It is only available for a particular amount of time, and after that time, food is not available for students. Sports were only during cultural events; otherwise, we don't play games.

reviews.review_heading: They need to give importance to practicals.
reviews.review_text: First of all, the rooms provided are spacious and well-built. The food provided in the hostel is at an okay level; there is no Wi-Fi provided for the hostel students. The food provided is scheduled at a particular time, and after that given time, the food will not be provided.

reviews.review_heading: AVS College of Technology- creating well trained engineers.
reviews.review_text: The hostel rooms are somewhat spacious, and the food is in the okay range. The timing of food in the morning is 9 a.m., in the afternoon is 12:45 p.m., and in the night is 07:30 p.m. They also provide snacks at 5 p.m. In our hostel, there are individual beds for each person and good water facilities for drinking .

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college has a neat campus. The campus is not much huge. The hostel rooms are cleaned every week. The food served in the hostel is good, clean, and healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Review of AVS College Of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our laboratory is perfect. It has all equipment. We have a hostel near our college campus. The infrastructure of the hostel is good. Its rooms and food are good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides a good laboratory.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all laboratories. The food served in the hostel is better and healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good laboratory.
reviews.review_text: The food served in the hostel is average.

reviews.review_heading: It is an affordable engineering college.
reviews.review_text: Our college consisted of three blocks. Block-1 was the main and first block. It had the mechanical department, ECE department, two computer labs, and a library with internet connectivity. Block-2 was the canteen. It had two floors, the ground floor was for day scholars, and the first floor was for hostelers. Block-3 had EEE and civil engineering labs with their corresponding classrooms. The quality of the food served was not tasty. Every classroom and lab had a first-aid kit. There is a separate...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a digital library. Wi-Fi is available on campus. The infrastructure of the labs is very good. All classrooms are good. The hostel provides very good food. It provides a water facility, a power supply, and a variety of snacks. The warden has a positive mindset.

reviews.review_heading: I was satisfied with this college because of its faculty members and placements in 2020.
reviews.review_text: There are many agricultural lands available. We have excellent classrooms and a library in the department. The level of facilities provided in our hostel is very high. A mess and canteen are available at our college.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in labs. Classrooms are good. There is a library in each department. The quality of the facilities provided in our hostel is very high. A mess and canteen are available. Medical facilities and sports facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: The placements in our college are nice and the coaching is good.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure and good environment inside the campus. The campus is not that big but the time we spent there are so precious. The food in the hostel in okay condition it is not too bad or too good. And you can get more benefits from staying in hostel and we can enjoys the weekend in hostel.

review_content.Placements: According to my knowledge, no student has been placed yet. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Pretty new college so keep very low expectations.

content.Placements: I don't think there has been any placement drive as of now because this is a very new college. So, highest and lowest package details are not available as of now. This college is very new, and students have to try for off-campus placements. There has been no recruitment drive till now.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms can be improved, especially the seating. But the computer lab is very well-equipped, and a good Wi-Fi connection is also available. Talking about the library, it's also well-equipped. The Wi-Fi is pretty good. Hostel is inaugurated recently but I do not know why they have not been allotted to students yet.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biomedical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied with the newly established engineering college.

content.Placements: Half of the students got jobs when they went from company to company and applied their resumes everywhere. The highest salary offered is Rs. 40,000. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 10,000 per month. Top recruiters are hospitals. They need biomedical engineers The top role offered was biomedical engineer in the hospital.
content.Infrastructure: Our college was established in 2017. The construction is still being done in and around campus, which is in a mess. Our college has separate buildings for separate courses however with new branches coming yearly it had to manage. There was no hostel at that time. Students live in rented rooms that charge significant amounts of money, taking advantage of students' vulnerable situations. Indoor sports primarily consist of table tennis.

reviews_list.review_title: N. S. N. College of Engineering and Technology is absolutely a good college.

review_content.Placements: This college has the best placements. This college provides placement training to all the students. Every year, this college conducts more than 15 campus interviews. All the students get good placements is reputed companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: This college has good classrooms with projector facilities and modern laboratories. The college has sports ground facilities. Good hostel and hygienic food is provided in this college. The taste of food is good.
review_content.Faculty: Teaching staff working in this college is highly qualified. They teach many lessons every week. Course curriculum is updated every year. 90% students get high marks.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.E. in Structural Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with facilities, placements, and faculty members of this college.

review_content.Placements: Around 60% of students got placed in this course. The average salary offered was Rs 50,000 per month. Top recruiting companies visit our college for recruitment. Almost 20% of students got placed in local companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. Laboratories are not good. Hostel facilities are average. Canteen is very small. Medical facilities are not available. Sports are not encouraged in this college.
review_content.Faculty: Few teachers are qualified and knowledgeable. The teaching quality is average. The course curriculum is not relevant to make students ready for the industry. The pass percentage is 45%. If we study properly, we can score good marks.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: A college which give a great motivation to me.

review_content.Placements: In my batch, there are around 50 % of people got job offers. I'm 2021 batch got the offer from Abirami Engineering works in campus interview drive but I'm not joining there dude to covid. They give 15 thousand per month. Likely Servomotor, Aqua groups, windcare India Pvt ltd. etc. Are came for placement drives.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure, In NSNCET they have four computer Laboratories, Physics Chemistry Laboratories, machines Laboratories, mechanical lathe Laboratory, civil Laboratory, and Electronics Laboratories. My hostel was not a hostel that is heaven, but the food was okay, not Bad.

faqs.question: Q: Is N.S.N. College Of Engineering And Technology a known college/Institute?

faqs.answer: N.S.N. College Of Engineering And Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at N.S.N. College Of Engineering And Technology are B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, N.S.N. College Of Engineering And Technology has a rating of 3.6 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 3.3, 3.7, 3.3 and 4 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: N.S.N. College Of Engineering And Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: N.S.N College of Engineering and Technology is one of the best colleges.

content.Placements: N.S.N. College of Engineering and Technology is the best placement college in Karur. This college has a strong alumni network. This college conducts more campus interviews every year. Final-year students are only eligible for these college campus interviews. This college brought more reputed companies like Reliance Industries, Tata Group, Infosys, IBM, Zoho, and TCS. 95 percent of students were placed in 2021. Salary packages range from 3-12 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: N.S.N. College of Engineering and Technology infrastructure facilities were excellent. This college has more spacious classrooms. This college has more laboratories. A well-stocked library is also here in this college. This college hostel facility is good; hostel rooms are daily maintained and in very good condition. Hostel and canteen foods are also good. This college has more sports grounds.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: N. S. N. College of Engineering and Technology is absolutely a good college.

content.Placements: This college has the best placements. This college provides placement training to all the students. Every year, this college conducts more than 15 campus interviews. All the students get good placements is reputed companies.
content.Infrastructure: This college has good classrooms with projector facilities and modern laboratories. The college has sports ground facilities. Good hostel and hygienic food is provided in this college. The taste of food is good.
content.Faculty: Teaching staff working in this college is highly qualified. They teach many lessons every week. Course curriculum is updated every year. 90% students get high marks.

individual_reviews.course: M.E. in Structural Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with facilities, placements, and faculty members of this college.

content.Placements: Around 60% of students got placed in this course. The average salary offered was Rs 50,000 per month. Top recruiting companies visit our college for recruitment. Almost 20% of students got placed in local companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. Laboratories are not good. Hostel facilities are average. Canteen is very small. Medical facilities are not available. Sports are not encouraged in this college.
content.Faculty: Few teachers are qualified and knowledgeable. The teaching quality is average. The course curriculum is not relevant to make students ready for the industry. The pass percentage is 45%. If we study properly, we can score good marks.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: A college which give a great motivation to me.

content.Placements: In my batch, there are around 50 % of people got job offers. I'm 2021 batch got the offer from Abirami Engineering works in campus interview drive but I'm not joining there dude to covid. They give 15 thousand per month. Likely Servomotor, Aqua groups, windcare India Pvt ltd. etc. Are came for placement drives.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure, In NSNCET they have four computer Laboratories, Physics Chemistry Laboratories, machines Laboratories, mechanical lathe Laboratory, civil Laboratory, and Electronics Laboratories. My hostel was not a hostel that is heaven, but the food was okay, not Bad.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I felt tortured day by day because of this college and faculty members.

content.Placements: I think more than 80% of the students from our course got placed. The highest salary offered is Rs. 35,000 per month, the average salary offered is Rs. 15,000 per month and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 9,000 per month. Top recruiting companies of our college are Tata steel industries, CRI pumps and pipes and automobile companies. The top role offered to the students is a machine operator. I didn't know about the salary offered to the students in our course. More than 90% of the students will get an internship every year.
content.Infrastructure: There is nothing to say about facilities. They don't give permission to bring a mobile phone to college, and even on Sunday is also they will conduct a special class. Every machine in engineering labs is not working, and they are only for the showcase. The hostel is much better, but the food facilities are not satisfactory.

faqs.question: How can I get into N.S.N. College Of Engineering And Technology for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
N.S.N. College Of Engineering And Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also e

faqs.answer: The overall seats available across all courses offered by N.S.N. College Of Engineering And Technology is up to 378. Good thing to know is that N.S.N. College Of Engineering And Technology has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.
faqs.question: Q: What is the scope of MBA?

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.

review_summary.college_name: Delhi Institute of Technology Management and Research Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is the number 1 college in Faridabad.

content.Placements: Almost 35-40% of students got placed in this course. The average salary package offered was 1.5 LPA. The highest salary package offered ranges between 3 LPA - 4 LPA by Hitachi. Internships are not offered in this course. I am not satisfied with the placements of this college.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, water cooler is not available. Our campus is not Wi-Fi-enabled. Classrooms are very good. Laboratory is not available. They offer rented rooms in the name of hostel. Mess is also not available. The food quality is average. A single shop is available on our campus. Medical facilities are not provided. Bus facility is available for transportation. Sports are conducted in this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure and a fee structure, but placements are less.

content.Placements: There are no placements. About 10% of students are placed. Students have to get placed with their own efforts.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is much better. Wi-Fi is also available, and 3 or 4 computer labs are available. Classrooms are also good in terms of size and capacity. The library has many kinds of books like motivational, branch-wise, aptitude, etc. There is a huge ground for sports and a medical room with multiple facilities.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are quite helpful. They guide us regarding our exams and future. The course has some subjects that are very important to be placed in the industry. Exams are not so difficult if we prepare for them. The passing percentage of students is about 80%.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: A college with good placements in 2015

content.Placements: 70% is the placement record in this college. 2-3 LPA is the average package provided here. VE Commercial Vehicles Ltd and Wipro Ltd are the major recruiters here for B.Tech in Civil, Mechanical and Computer Science Engineers. All students get internships from the course of BBA, MBA, and B.Tech.
content.Infrastructure: On the college campus, we get a good facility of the canteen and medical facilities are perfect here. All labs are available in this college and there are facilities for games like Cricket, football, kabadi and indoor games like Chess, Carrom, Ludo and so many games. In the labs, computer science students work on their projects and practice coding.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied with having no college life or good placements.

content.Placements: When we pass out from there, we don't get any placement because lockdown is going on.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is below average. When this college was made, it seemed to be good, but now the walls are cracked and there is no air conditioner working properly. An air conditioner is present in every room. There is no hostel, canteen, sports activities or games.
content.Faculty: Teachers are good. They are helpful, innovative, and experienced. All are supportive except for two or three teachers, and these two or three have no sense of communication. The pass percentage is 50% to 70%.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It has good atmosphere, area for study is greenery, and also provides bus and hostel facility.

content.Placements: Students need maximum marks for placements. But good area for study. There are many vacancies in computer science engineering. B.Tech and diploma branches are computer science, civil, automobile, mechanical, electrical, BBA, MBA, M.Tech, and more courses.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is avaible. It provides a bus facility, and hostel. All types of laboratories are needed in engineering, and a canteen facility is also provided. The hostel is far from college, and students have the option of college bus to arrive college daily. The staff is also good. Library is available and a water cooler, a first aid room, and all the necessary facilities are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: College is average. If you are local and don't want to go away from home, must choose this.

review_content.Placements: When I was in college, no placements were recorded there. But when I joined, I came to know that previous batches were placed in companies. There percentages were approximately 80. About packages, it was around 200,000. But during my batch, no placements were recorded there.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities on the campus are very good. The campus is very huge, just like an NIT campus. Labs and classrooms are well maintained. Library is jam-packed with the relevant books. Wi-Fi is also available, but with limited access. Hostel facilities are average. Mess, canteen, medical and sports facilities are very good as there is a hospital inside the campus and also a cricket stadium is there, where we can practice more and more.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and facilities like sports games etc., are available.

review_content.Placements: Our college offers only a few placement opportunities. But the placements totally depend on students' talents and capabilities. But if you want to get placed in a good company, then go for a better college. This college is useful just to get a degree. I suggest those students who want to start their career in MNCs should not join this college. This college is the best for local students who want to complete their graduation apply for government competitive exams.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very impressive. The entire campus is enabled with the Wi-Fi facility. There are separate canteens for every department. Hostel rooms are average. A basketball court is available for all the students. A cricket stadium is also available to conduct sports tournaments. There is a separate library for every department. A huge collection of books are also present there. A big and attractive auditorium is also available, and this auditorium is the main asset of our college.

review_summary.college_name: Jan Nayak Ch. Devi Lal Memorial College Of Engineering (JCDCOE) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Impressed by events and infrastructure at JCDM College of Engineering.

content.Placements: The placements are not good. The companies that visit the college are small and the number of companies that visit is also small. The highest package was only 2.5 lpa. On the plus side, the college does not provide any internships, and the fees are very affordable, so the ROI is okay.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college and hostel is very good. Each college has a central garden, labs, libraries, and classrooms with large windows, five fans, and five lights. The Wi-Fi speed is 25 mbps on campus and an impressive 55 mbps in the labs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides very good infrastructure.

content.Placements: The placement and internship percentage in our college is low. Students get good placements if they work hard and are passionate about their courses. In 2019, a student got placed with a salary package of 13 LPA in a famous company.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. It has a big building and a huge green park in front of the building. There are cricket, football, and basketball grounds. Our college supports students in sports. It has its national cricket academy.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: College is average. If you are local and don't want to go away from home, must choose this.

content.Placements: When I was in college, no placements were recorded there. But when I joined, I came to know that previous batches were placed in companies. There percentages were approximately 80. About packages, it was around 200,000. But during my batch, no placements were recorded there.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities on the campus are very good. The campus is very huge, just like an NIT campus. Labs and classrooms are well maintained. Library is jam-packed with the relevant books. Wi-Fi is also available, but with limited access. Hostel facilities are average. Mess, canteen, medical and sports facilities are very good as there is a hospital inside the campus and also a cricket stadium is there, where we can practice more and more.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and facilities like sports games etc., are available.

content.Placements: Our college offers only a few placement opportunities. But the placements totally depend on students' talents and capabilities. But if you want to get placed in a good company, then go for a better college. This college is useful just to get a degree. I suggest those students who want to start their career in MNCs should not join this college. This college is the best for local students who want to complete their graduation apply for government competitive exams.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very impressive. The entire campus is enabled with the Wi-Fi facility. There are separate canteens for every department. Hostel rooms are average. A basketball court is available for all the students. A cricket stadium is also available to conduct sports tournaments. There is a separate library for every department. A huge collection of books are also present there. A big and attractive auditorium is also available, and this auditorium is the main asset of our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Some startup companies hired students when I passed out from this college. I also got selected in the campus placements. But the overall placements in the core field were less. Companies related to marketing visited the college, and my field was mechanical trade.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a great infrastructure with all equipment in labs. All the practical topics were taught by teachers. There were spacious classrooms with a proper hygienic environment. There was a great auditorium where all the cultural events were organised. Various sports activities were also organised which is a very good thing for any college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (FSD and Cloud Computing) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It has good infrastructure, supportive faculty, and active campus life.

review_content.Placements: Currently, I am in the 2nd year of B.Tech in Information Technology course. Based on the placement records of previous batches, around 80-85 percent of students get placed. The highest package is 15 LPA and the average package ranges from 6-7 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course include TCS Infosys Wipro and Accenture. Common roles offered are software developer data analyst and system engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The B.Tech IT department has smart classrooms, WiFi enabled labs and access to a digital library. Hostel rooms are clean with 24x7 electricity and water. The mess provides hygienic food and the canteen has affordable options. Medical and sports facilities are also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (FSD and Cloud Computing) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure, supportive faculty, and active campus life.

content.Placements: Currently, I am in the 2nd year of B.Tech in Information Technology course. Based on the placement records of previous batches, around 80-85 percent of students get placed. The highest package is 15 LPA and the average package ranges from 6-7 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course include TCS Infosys Wipro and Accenture. Common roles offered are software developer data analyst and system engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The B.Tech IT department has smart classrooms, WiFi enabled labs and access to a digital library. Hostel rooms are clean with 24x7 electricity and water. The mess provides hygienic food and the canteen has affordable options. Medical and sports facilities are also available.

highlights.summary: Summary not available

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science & Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: If you are good at using opportunities, you can come to this college.

review_content.Placements: I'm in the second year at Koneru Lakshmaiah Educational Foundation, in the Bachelor of Technology. In our class, no one has been placed in any companies, but some got internships. Basically, it is a good college. Companies are coming for placements and internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel doesn't have many facilities, but it has basic amenities like AC, good beds, study tables, washing machines, and an indoor playroom. However, it doesn't have many games to play. They maintain the hostel reasonably well, but the food is the worst.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science & Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements for students.

review_content.Placements: Well, I am a second-year student right now. We are the second batch of this campus, so there is no placement right now. But as much as I know, there are 100% placement here highest being 75 LPA. My seniors have a paid internship of 80k rupees per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities are pretty good here, and coming to infrastructure its pretty average and can be improved more. The quality of the hostel, mess, canteen, and medical facilities is really very good. The college also encourages people who are into sports and start-ups, too. Everything is well managed.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science & Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements and a good study curriculum. A single building but good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Overall around 900 student are placed into various companies this year. Top companies like Infosys, Visa, Dell etc have visited our campus. Our main branch campus is in Vijayawada which is also amazing. The average package is around 7LPA. Almost 60 percent of students got internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is amazing. There is a high speed WI-FI facility. The classrooms are well maintained with AC. We have a full floor for only labs with almost over 400 Computer Systems. We even have ECE department electronics lab. The library is also amazing with a wide variety of books available.

college_info.college_name: Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET): Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET):

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET) offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech and UG Diploma. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET) courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET) courses stands around INR 66,000 to 2,68,648.

faqs.answer:
A:    Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in relevant stream from a recognised Institute.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E. or B.Tech in Computer / Information Technology, MCA (mathematics as optional in UG)/M.Sc. (Info. Tech.)/M.Sc. (Comp.Sc.) from RTU or any other recognised University/Institution or any other examinations recognised as equivalent thereto by the competent authority.
 Candidate must have minimum 55% (6.25 CGPA on 10 points scale and equivalent) marks in the qualifying degree examination (50% or 5.75 CGPA on 10 points scale of relaxation is admissible for SC/ST candidates).
Candidates with qualifications obtained through examinations conducted by professional societies recognised by MHRD/UGC/AIU/UPSC/AICTE {e.g. AMIE by Institute ofEngineers (India); AMICE by Institute of Civil Engineers (India); IEE} as equivalent to B.E./B.Tech. are also eligible.UG DiplomaCandidate must have passed class 10th examination or its equivalent with Science and Mathematics subjects and secured at least 35% marks from a recognised board.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed class 10th examination or its equivalent with Science and Mathematics subjects and secured at least 35% marks from a recognised board.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET) for UG/PG courses?

faqs.answer: A:    Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET) has courses such as MCA, B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech, UG Diploma, After 1th Diploma which are primarily in the stream of IT & Software, Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET) has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, UG Diploma specializations in Civil Engineering, After 10th Diploma specializations in Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.
faqs.question: What courses are available at Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET)?

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET) are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET) goes up to 678.
faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET)?

review_content.General: In terms of facilities, this college is a good choice. It has a very large campus area including 4 blocks separately of every branch (computer science, electrical, mechanical and civil ), also has a swimming pool, cafeteria, cricket ground (including net practice area), football ground, basketball court, volleyball court, 5 badminton courts, and a large auditorium. All labs are connected to Wi-Fi and have a good collection of books in library. There are 5 hostels for boys and 3 hostels for girls separately. Mess is too bad.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: My college days and college life.

review_content.Placements: A total of around 70 to 80% of students qualify for the placement round due to their qualification factors, like attendance percentage and their backlogs. The average package offered was around 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are like Wipro, TCS, Mahindra, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure was decent it contains of lecture halls, conference halls, different types of labs for different courses, library which contains more than 50,000 books, and a cafeteria. All over the college campus infrastructure was decent. The food quality that offered in hostel mess is also very good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: LIET – A base of upcoming engineers.

review_content.Placements: About 60% of the students were placed in this course because this course is very beneficial for the upcoming generation. The average package of this course is about 3.5–4.5 LPA, and companies like Infosys, Wipro, etc., gave internships to the students of this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very old, but still very strong. The facilities of the college are quite good. The labs, library, classrooms, etc., are well maintained, and the hostel and mess are also very good. The canteen is very large, and its food is also good. Sports and games are also played for physical fitness.

faq_section.introduction: Here are some additional updates regarding the Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET):

answer.text: Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET) is a reputed institute for MCA, B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech, UG Diploma, After 1th Diploma. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in IT & Software, Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET) has a review rating of 3.5 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.4 on campuslife, 3 on placements, 3.5 on faculty and 3.6 on Infrastructure.

faqs.question: Can Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET) be considered a good college?

answer.text: Courses offerred by Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET) are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET) goes up to 678.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET)?

answer.text: Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in relevant stream from a recognised Institute.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E. or B.Tech in Computer / Information Technology, MCA (mathematics as optional in UG)/M.Sc. (Info. Tech.)/M.Sc. (Comp.Sc.) from RTU or any other recognised University/Institution or any other examinations recognised as equivalent thereto by the competent authority. Candidate must have minimum 55% (6.25 CGPA on 10 points scale and equivalent) marks in the qualifying degree examination (50% or 5.75 CGPA on 10 points scale of relaxation is admissible for SC/ST candidates). Candidates with qualifications obtained through examinations conducted by professional societies recognised by MHRD/UGC/AIU/UPSC/AICTE {e.g. AMIE by Institute ofEngineers (India); AMICE by Institute of Civil Engineers (India); IEE} as equivalent to B.E./B.Tech. are also eligible.UG DiplomaCandidate must have passed class 10th examination or its equivalent with Science and Mathematics subjects and secured at least 35% marks from a recognised board.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed class 10th examination or its equivalent with Science and Mathematics subjects and secured at least 35% marks from a recognised board.

overview_faqs.question: Can Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET) be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET) is a reputed institute for MCA, B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech, UG Diploma, After 1th Diploma. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in IT & Software, Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET) has a review rating of 3.5 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.4 on campuslife, 3 on placements, 3.5 on faculty and 3.6 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Empowering students and the mind.

content.Placements: An average of 80% students were placed from my course. The highest package was 5 LPA, the lowest package was 1 LPA, and the average package was 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Genpact, Hitachi, HDFC, and NXT. About 80% of students got successful internships from the course at Genpact and HDFC Bank. Top roles offered were administrative consultant and senior advisor.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities available were Wi-Fi, fan, light, library, and playground. The quality of hostel was good. All the things such as beds and almirah were provided. Mess was also good with fresh serving every day. Sports and medical facilities were overall perfect.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with the facilities and placements are low.

content.Placements: There are only 60 students in my batch. The highest package offered for computer science students is 41 LPA and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Google, Microsoft, Apple, Infosys, HCL and many more. Very less students got the opportunity for internship in giants companies, generally they went in a company or does an in-campus internship. The top roles offered in computer Science are tech manager and executive director.
content.Infrastructure: In terms of facilities, this college is a good choice. It has a very large campus area including 4 blocks separately of every branch (computer science, electrical, mechanical and civil ), also has a swimming pool, cafeteria, cricket ground (including net practice area), football ground, basketball court, volleyball court, 5 badminton courts, and a large auditorium. All labs are connected to Wi-Fi and have a good collection of books in library. There are 5 hostels for boys and 3 hostels for girls separately. Mess is too bad.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: My college days and college life.

content.Placements: A total of around 70 to 80% of students qualify for the placement round due to their qualification factors, like attendance percentage and their backlogs. The average package offered was around 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are like Wipro, TCS, Mahindra, etc.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure was decent it contains of lecture halls, conference halls, different types of labs for different courses, library which contains more than 50,000 books, and a cafeteria. All over the college campus infrastructure was decent. The food quality that offered in hostel mess is also very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: LIET – A base of upcoming engineers.

content.Placements: About 60% of the students were placed in this course because this course is very beneficial for the upcoming generation. The average package of this course is about 3.5–4.5 LPA, and companies like Infosys, Wipro, etc., gave internships to the students of this course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very old, but still very strong. The facilities of the college are quite good. The labs, library, classrooms, etc., are well maintained, and the hostel and mess are also very good. The canteen is very large, and its food is also good. Sports and games are also played for physical fitness.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides excellent opportunities.

content.Placements: Top recruiting companies like Wipro, TCS, HCL, Sony, etc., visited our campus. The salary package offered is 4 LPA. The recruitment of students on this campus is very formative, like a written test of reasoning and technical questions, and then they are shortlisted for the next interview round.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has many hostels like Karakoram, Vindhay, Niligari, Luxury, etc. Our college provides good facilities and safety for the girls' hostel. The college has good environment. The quality of the food is good. There are many instruments in the working labs of DC, MATLAB, ACS, and the machine lab. The lab assistant is supportive of students during the experiment.

paragraphs:
Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET) course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. Interested students can get theLaxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET)application form from the university campus. The form has to be submitted along with specified documents.
Students can pursue UG, PG and After 10th programmes in fields of Engineering, Business and Management Studies and IT and Software, and more. To know about the eligibility of Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET) courses, students can visit the website.

Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET) fee structure consists of caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, and more. The mode of payment for Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET) fees is online. reviews.review_heading: Review of Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available such as Wi-Fi and laboratories. Our campus has good environment. There is a huge library and several books are available. Classrooms are well-maintained. Hostels are average. There is a garden on our campus. Swimming pool is also available. There is a huge auditorium in this college. Sports center is better. We also have a gym facility in this college. Canteen is available. There is a huge playground for sports like cricket and football.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET).
reviews.review_text: It's a good college with good infrastructure and compare to other engineering colleges it's better and worth it. The hostel is not much good, there are only vegetarians and no non-vegetarians. But I neglect it behind the college infrastructure. Although we have a big library, canteen and also playgrounds for different sports are available.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for economically-weaker students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. There are separate buildings for different works. The library is placed where there is less noise, and any person can study there for hours. Wi-Fi facility is available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good placements for 2015, and around 50% of students are placed.
reviews.review_text: The facilities at present days are poor because this college is affected by covid-19. Wi-Fi is available in our college. Proper laboratories and classrooms are available. A big library is available but the books are very old. Medical facilities are also available in our college. Sports like badminton, cricket, and football ground are available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with supportive faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good enough with the mess, auditorium, swimming pool, volleyball and basketball court. The quality of food served here is good. Our college did not have medical facilities. Sports and games are focused but only for the hostellers.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty members are too good, but the mess food here is the worst.
reviews.review_text: The whole campus has Wi-Fi connectivity. Labs are well-equipped. The classrooms are well furnished too. Our department has every facility for academics with above-average quality. But there aren't many facilities for sports and games. The hostel rooms are average, and there is no facility of inverter or generator if electricity fails. Mess food is average, and sometimes, it's the worst. We only get great food when there is any function or event. Medical facilities are great. There is always an a...

reviews.review_heading: Nice college with above average facilities and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were of average type. Wi-Fi was not available for all students at free of cost as connection was not public. Library was big and good and had good no. of books. Labs were average type and quite old instruments were there in the labs. Hostel was good and food served in the hostel and canteen was good. First aid was available but proper medical facilities was not present In the campus. Big sports group was there in our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good hostel and faculty...........
reviews.review_text:
1- Nice infrastructure and many blocks are there.
2 - All facilities are available. Hostel have facilities like, laundary, nice mess food, grounds, canteen and physical training.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is average.
reviews.review_text: The building of LIET was awesome in the beginning. Later, it is not taken good care. The campus is huge but has cattle like cows. Grounds are available for students to play, and there is a lot of greenery. Labs are available for every branch. Every branch has a separate building.

reviews.review_heading: Laxmi Devi Institute of Engineering and Technology (LIET) is a good college.
reviews.review_text: There are all the required facilities available for students in every college. In our college, there are separate different computer labs for different subjects. Library in the college was nice to study. Classrooms are clean. Meals served in the hostel are average. Hostel rooms are on par with the fee charged. All the facilities are good here.

admission_process.title: Rewa Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Rewa Institute of Technology admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in streams includingEngineering, Business and Management Studies and IT and Software.Rewa Institute of Technologyadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asJEE Main, CMAT, and MP BE. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 39,000 - 99,600for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses is 4 years.

college_info.college_name: Mahaguru Institute of Technology: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: The KEAM 2026 registration for admission to the BE/BTech and BPharma courses is now over. The exam for the same will be conducted from Apr 13, 2026, to Apr 25, 2026.

reviews_list.review_title: It provides a good campus and vibes.

review_content.Placements: Around one-third of students are placed, and the average packages are offered. Tata Consulting Services and a few infotech are the top recruiting companies. Skyline, etc., visit to hire students in placements cell confident group and others.
review_content.Infrastructure: In this college, Wi-Fi is available. Laboratories are of average instruments must be improved. The teachers are trained enough, and provide good library facility with a decent classroom. The hostel is not good, and the food served in the canteen is average. The medical facilities are average, but sports and games are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: This college provides good facilities and well known technical support.

review_content.Placements: Around 88% of students got internships. Almost 91% of students were placed in our course, and they offered top roles. Students got placed in the best top companies around the world. The top recruiting companies were Tata, Birla, Amazon, and some other top companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for our course was excellent. It provides a highly secure laboratory with modern classrooms and 7,00,000 book collections available in library, which helps the student to get to know about technologies. The mainly mechanical field the laboratory facility was available in our college which was in a very good manner.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: I don't recommend this college.

review_content.Placements: There are not very many students who are being placed in any company. Only 15 percent of the students are placed by some minor companies. The highest package of Denver courses is around 1.5 LPA, and the lowest is around 35–40,000 per annum.
review_content.Infrastructure: In the computer lab, there are only a few computers that work properly, most of the computers are outdated. There is no strong Wi-Fi connection. About classrooms, there are not very many problems, but the whole college is a mess. Every inch of the college building is cracking and falling apart, and on rainy days water collects in your classroom, creating small puddles. One time, a small piece of building fell when 2 faculty members and some students are passing by, by luck, no one is hurt.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Mahaguru Institute of technology.

content.Placements: There were no campus placements whatsoever. Students who got placed earned it through their own hard work. This is not only seen in Mahaguru Institute of Technology but in most of the engineering colleges in Kerala. Students are not properly taught what is required.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is awfully bad. The only positive I can say is the front view and the incomplete library. Washrooms are in pathetic condition. There are no proper halls for extracurricular activities. No proper ground and in an extremely hot climate, we need permission from the principal for running the air-conditioner.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It was a nice experience to study in such a college with wonderful facilities and excellent faculty.

content.Placements: Full-fledged amenities and classroom I was a civil engineering student and the class was awesome but there was no active placement cell and no involvement of activity indulged and the CS department was mostly getting placement that too very low in number.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities were awesome and the overall ambiance and vibe of college were super to enjoy with our friends and spend the valuable time of our life. The campus was having every essential amenities and was not compromised on that aspect.

hostel_campus.college_name: Mahaguru Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mahaguru Institute of technology.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is awfully bad. The only positive I can say is the front view and the incomplete library. Washrooms are in pathetic condition. There are no proper halls for extracurricular activities. No proper ground and in an extremely hot climate, we need permission from the principal for running the air-conditioner.

reviews.review_heading: It was a nice experience to study in such a college with wonderful facilities and excellent faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities were awesome and the overall ambiance and vibe of college were super to enjoy with our friends and spend the valuable time of our life. The campus was having every essential amenities and was not compromised on that aspect.

reviews.review_heading: It provides a good campus and vibes.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi is available. Laboratories are of average instruments must be improved. The teachers are trained enough, and provide good library facility with a decent classroom. The hostel is not good, and the food served in the canteen is average. The medical facilities are average, but sports and games are good.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides good facilities and well known technical support.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our course was excellent. It provides a highly secure laboratory with modern classrooms and 7,00,000 book collections available in library, which helps the student to get to know about technologies. The mainly mechanical field the laboratory facility was available in our college which was in a very good manner.

reviews.review_heading: I don't recommend this college.
reviews.review_text: In the computer lab, there are only a few computers that work properly, most of the computers are outdated. There is no strong Wi-Fi connection. About classrooms, there are not very many problems, but the whole college is a mess. Every inch of the college building is cracking and falling apart, and on rainy days water collects in your classroom, creating small puddles. One time, a small piece of building fell when 2 faculty members and some students are passing by, by luck, no one is hurt.

reviews.review_heading: College is awes with good experienced faculty and good friendly attachment .
reviews.review_text:
College with air conditioned lab and good hostel .
Good lab facilites with new testing machine. And aesthetic lab fully functioned efficient.  In one week vegeterian and non vegeterian food  is available . Canteen is awesome with good food and understanding and friendly staff .

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and faculty are just okay, but college fests and other programs are awesome.
reviews.review_text: The canteen and college ground are average and do not have a good atmospheric feel, but the library and computer lab are literally good. Toilets need more improvement. They should add sanitizers and handwashes for students. In the canteen washrooms, they do not have handwashes and sanitizers.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest students do not join it for placements. The college is just overrated among the public.
reviews.review_text: Hostel food is very poor and non-hygienic. They take phones after 7 PM, so hostellers can't go through notes sent by faculty members at that time. Some computers in labs are good, but some are not. In some systems, we can't run a program, and some have older versions. It will waste a lot of time, especially during lab exams, as we type our program and while running it, we can't perform, and we have to retype it all on another computer.

reviews_list.review_title: Overall good college but there is no campus life as its own campus is not ready yet.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement till now as our college 1st batch will pass out in july 2023. So there is no idea of placement till now. But internships are very good here. From 1st year u will get internship in iocl and other companies in research fields.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classroom and library are good. Wi-Fi is also available in college premises. Hostel rooms are very spacious with accommodation of 3 students in each room. Quality of food is good in mess. Medical facilities is also there. But there is no canteen in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Integrated M.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Institute of Chemical Technology, Bhubaneswar .

review_content.Placements: About 80% placements can be seen in previous batches. The highest package fir last year was 22.5 LPA and the lowest was 7 LPA. Mandatory internship in at good places. Companies related to chemical industry visit during the placement session. Average placement cell.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in the hostel and the college but speed is not so good. Overall hostel is good but some students can face issue in mess food. Good lab facilities. Chemical and instruments are available in labs. Average classrooms. Sports events are organised some time.

reviews_list.batch_info: Integrated M.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: College is definitely not worse if not excellent. I would say above average.

review_content.Placements: Last year placement percentage was about 83% with the lowest being 7 LPA and the highest being 21 LPA by cpcl to 6 students. Average package is around 8 LPA as of last year. Top recruiting companies were ExxonMobil, reliance, Chennai petroleum corporations limited. Internship is by far not to bother about in this college if you have good CGPA. I personally know many seniors who went for internship in Dubai, UK. I also know one senior who went for internship at BARC.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not too big but definitely doesn't lack facilities. Labs are well mentioned with all the necessary equipment and research facilities. Even we have electronic microscope, NMR, XRD, LIQUID NITROGEN PLANT. All the equipments needed in this course and research is present. Free Wi-Fi is provided within the college and hostel premises with AC classrooms, libraries and labs. Libraries are well maintained with significant amount of books and journals.
