This round is conducted for allotment of seats.Admission Confirmation: Candidates who recieve the final admission letter, must pay the admission fee to secure the allotted seat.

faqs.question: Is admission process at Indian Oil campus, Bhubaneswar, ICT, Mumbai entrance based or merit based?
faqs.answer: The admission process at ndian Oil campus, Bhubaneswar, ICT, Mumbai is strictly entrance based. The institute accepts a host of entrance exams for admission to the programmes offered, namely, OJEE, GATE, JEE Main, GPAT, MHT CET.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at IndianOil Odisha Campus?
faqs.answer: No, the IndianOil Odisha Campus of the Institute of Chemical Technology, Mumbai does not offer direct admissions and does not reserve any seats under special management quota. As such students must get admission purely on merit alone with entrance exam scores such as JEE Mains, GATE, etc. being required for admission to the PG courses.

faqs.question: Is there enough demand for BTech graduates in the job market?
faqs.answer: If we look at the market demand, no doubt there is huge demand for BTech (Full Form: Bachelor of Technology) graduates among top recruiters who are constantly looking for skilled and knowledgeable students with fresh ideas to enhance their business growth and profitability. Having said that, a few previous-year employment reports published by the Business Standard and Times of India suggest that students found it a struggle to land a high-paying job after completing BTech because of a lack of industry-specific skills and knowledge and cut-throat competition between Lacs of engineering students hunting for a job. Hence, it is very important for students to focus on enhancing their skill set according to industrial demands and technological advancements, stay updated regarding all industry trends, build good networks and, most importantly, take up internships to gain experience and stand out in front of the employer. Read more: B Tech Jobs in India

reviews.review_heading: I am fully satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are of top level with 24 hrs electricity and Wi-Fi availability. The classrooms, library, and the labs are fully air conditioned Hostels provides room with 4 students sharing each room having attach washrooms. Washing machines are provided for washing clothes. Food quality is also good in the mess. Our college is tied up with KIIMS for medical facilities. There are issues with outdoor games like cricket and basketball as we are currently in a temporary campus and do not have access to...

reviews.review_heading: Overall good college but there is no campus life as its own campus is not ready yet.
reviews.review_text: Classroom and library are good. Wi-Fi is also available in college premises. Hostel rooms are very spacious with accommodation of 3 students in each room. Quality of food is good in mess. Medical facilities is also there. But there is no canteen in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Institute of Chemical Technology, Bhubaneswar .
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in the hostel and the college but speed is not so good. Overall hostel is good but some students can face issue in mess food. Good lab facilities. Chemical and instruments are available in labs. Average classrooms. Sports events are organised some time.

reviews.review_heading: College is definitely not worse if not excellent. I would say above average.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not too big but definitely doesn't lack facilities. Labs are well mentioned with all the necessary equipment and research facilities. Even we have electronic microscope, NMR, XRD, LIQUID NITROGEN PLANT. All the equipments needed in this course and research is present. Free Wi-Fi is provided within the college and hostel premises with AC classrooms, libraries and labs. Libraries are well maintained with significant amount of books and journals.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good efforts of our management to make sure everyone is successful .

review_content.Placements: 90% of students got placed in my course, and the highest package is like 12 LPA and the lowest package is like 3 LPA. Most of us got recruited by top companies like IBM, Wipro, and Cognizant. We got internships at companies like DRDA Bangalore, IIT madras and IIT Tirupati.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is outstanding and laboratories and classrooms are maintained at the top level. We also have a big library. But unfortunately, my college cannot provide Wi-Fi to the students. The medical facilities are available 24 hours a day. Our team leads the state in sporys and games. The food in canteen is better than the food in hostel mess.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Average. Placements are not top class.

review_content.Placements: The students placed are nearly 60% the highest package offered was 6 LPA. The top recruiting companies are HCL, Byjus, etc. The percent of students got internships are just of 40%. Top roles offered in my course are just project head, software developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has no Wi-Fi, the classrooms are average and library is decent. The hostel facilities are poor. Sports facilities are very nice. The canteen rate is very high. Mess food is not nice. It is below average. Hostel does not have much facilities. Going out is very rare and only on Sundays.

faqs.question: Q: Which courses does Pavai College of Technology offer to students?

faqs.answer: Pavai College of Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engg. Candidate belonging to reserved category must have 45% in qualifying examination. Candidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech. degrees obtained through Distance/Weekend mode are not eligible. Candidates with degree obtained without studying 10th/12th Std. or 3 years degree programme are not eligible. Candidates appearing for the final semester/year are also eligible.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is good and satisfactory for fees.

content.Placements: Top MNC companies hire CSE students, such as CTS, TCS, HCL, Hexaware, etc. The placement office gives successful training for all students with talented and experienced trainers. Apart from MNC companies, more than 100 companies hire students on campus.
content.Infrastructure: I am a Computer Science and Engineering student. The college gives all the facilities for the students, such as a computer laboratory and a library. The hostel food is very nice, compared with other hostel food. There is a WiFi connection, but students need to pay for it. The hostel is fully safe.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Pavai College of Technology.

content.Placements: Above 80% of students get placed, and the highest package is 12 lakhs per annum; the average package is 7 lakhs per annum; and the lowest package is 4 lakhs per annum. The top recruiting companies at my college are MNC companies like Wipro, Infosys and TCS. The percentage of students who got internships is above 85% and I was placed at Infosys, where the role is chief executive officer .
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure of our department are too good and Wi-Fi is not provided in my college labs and classes. The quality in my hostel is too bad, especially the food, which is the worst available in the mess. The canteen is okay and the medical facilities, sports and games are better .

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good efforts of our management to make sure everyone is successful .

content.Placements: 90% of students got placed in my course, and the highest package is like 12 LPA and the lowest package is like 3 LPA. Most of us got recruited by top companies like IBM, Wipro, and Cognizant. We got internships at companies like DRDA Bangalore, IIT madras and IIT Tirupati.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is outstanding and laboratories and classrooms are maintained at the top level. We also have a big library. But unfortunately, my college cannot provide Wi-Fi to the students. The medical facilities are available 24 hours a day. Our team leads the state in sporys and games. The food in canteen is better than the food in hostel mess.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Average. Placements are not top class.

content.Placements: The students placed are nearly 60% the highest package offered was 6 LPA. The top recruiting companies are HCL, Byjus, etc. The percent of students got internships are just of 40%. Top roles offered in my course are just project head, software developer.
content.Infrastructure: It has no Wi-Fi, the classrooms are average and library is decent. The hostel facilities are poor. Sports facilities are very nice. The canteen rate is very high. Mess food is not nice. It is below average. Hostel does not have much facilities. Going out is very rare and only on Sundays.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Robotics and Automation - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A good College but the expenditure of money for the facilities is too much.

content.Placements: They provide placements with various companies which includes Jio, TCS and others. There are about 22 companies that have tie up with our college and placement percentage of students is nearly 35%. If you study well and prove good talent then you will definitely get a chance of placement.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is really good and faculty members are also good. The food is average. Hostel management is very poor and for maintaining the hostel and for serving the food they charge around 65000 per year.

faqs.question: How can I get into Pavai College of Technology for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Pavai College of Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engg.
Candidate belonging to reserved category must have 45% in qualifying examination.
Candidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible.
AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.
Candidates with B.E./B.Tech. degrees obtained through Distance/Weekend mode are not eligible.
Candidates with degree obtained without studying 10th/12th Std. or 3 years degree programme are not eligible.
Candidates appearing for the final semester/year are also eligible.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. The

hostel_campus.college_name: Pavai College of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The college is good and satisfactory for fees.
reviews.review_text: I am a Computer Science and Engineering student. The college gives all the facilities for the students, such as a computer laboratory and a library. The hostel food is very nice, compared with other hostel food. There is a WiFi connection, but students need to pay for it. The hostel is fully safe.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Pavai College of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of our department are too good and Wi-Fi is not provided in my college labs and classes. The quality in my hostel is too bad, especially the food, which is the worst available in the mess. The canteen is okay and the medical facilities, sports and games are better .

reviews.review_heading: Good efforts of our management to make sure everyone is successful .
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of the college is outstanding and laboratories and classrooms are maintained at the top level. We also have a big library. But unfortunately, my college cannot provide Wi-Fi to the students. The medical facilities are available 24 hours a day. 
Our team leads the state in sporys and games. The food in canteen is better than the food in hostel mess.

reviews.review_heading: Average. Placements are not top class.
reviews.review_text: It has no Wi-Fi, the classrooms are average and library is decent. The hostel facilities are poor. Sports facilities are very nice. The canteen rate is very high. Mess food is not nice. It is below average. Hostel does not have much facilities. Going out is very rare and only on Sundays.

reviews.review_heading: A good College but the expenditure of money for the facilities is too much.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is really good and faculty members are also good. The food is average. Hostel management is very poor and for maintaining the hostel and for serving the food they charge around 65000 per year.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of the faculty, good placements,  good infrastructure, etc.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The food in the hostel is slightly disappointing. Classrooms are clean. The library has more than 300,000 books in different fields. Sports and games are allowed after college hours.

reviews.review_heading: In this college, the faculty is good, and the placement is also good. There are so many placements.
reviews.review_text: The course is excellent, and we have to work hard. We study well. The hostel is average, and the food is also average. There is no attached bathroom, and it is also not clean. The food is also not cooked properly, and sometimes it will come with ants and mosquitoes in the curries. The curries are also not nice, but the buttermilk is good, and snacks are also provided daily. The mess is the worst, and the canteen also charges a high cost for outside food.

reviews.review_heading: This is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: There is a Wi-Fi facility available in the hostels of this college, but it's not rechargeable. The particulate lab is not cleaned and the machines are not in working condition. The classrooms are well organised. The hostel food is not that good.

college_info.intro:
ANA Group of Institutions popular courses are BSc and MBA. The institute offers BSc in Nursing. The course focuses on providing detailed nursing knowledge to medical aspirants and open opportunities in the healthcare sector. BSc Nursing students can work as Case Manager, Nurse Anesthetist, Certified Nurse Midwife, and other­s.
ANA Group of Institutions is one of the prestigious institutes. The institute offers an MBA which focuses on providing fundamental management knowledge. Students get core knowledge in fields such as Finance, HR, Marketing, and Accounting. After pursuing an MBA, students can get job opportunities such as HR Manager, Financial Advisor, Operation Manager, etc. Tabulated below are the details of the ANA Group of Institutions course, eligibility, and fees:

faqs.answer: A:    The career prospects after completing an MBA from ANA Group of Institutions prepare the students with fundamental management knowledge. Students get a holistic view of business core areas like Marketing, Finance, Accounting and HR. The average salary offered is INR 4 LPA – INR 8 LPA. The MBA degree holders are eligible to work in various sectors. Some of the popular job roles are HR Manager, Finance Manager, Management Analyst, Operation Manager, and others.

admission_overview.description: ANA Group of Institutions admission is primarily entrance-based; however, merit-based admissions may also be offered at the institute's discretion. Students are offered several programmes at the undergraduate and postgraduate levels. These courses are offered in the fields of Commerce, Science, Pharmacy, and more. ANA Group of Institutions offers courses, such as BAMS, BSc, BTech, MBA, and more. The institute is affiliated with the AKTU, BTE, MJPRU, Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University and State Medical Faculty. The institute's application process commences offline; however, online applications are also considered. Interested students can read the following article to learn more about the institute's admission criteria, process, and other relevant information about the offered programmes.

Students seeking to join the institute need to meet both the basic eligibility requirements in addition to clearing the selection rounds, depending on the programme. The courses are offered in full-time mode and the duration ranges between two to 4.5 years depending on the programme. The institute accepts both national and state-level entrance test scores. Alternatively, management quota can also be availed by eligible students. admission_process.title: ANA Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: The admission procedure for ANA Group of Institutions includes multiple steps, such as application, selection, and seat confirmation. Eligible students can then proceed accordingly with the rest of the steps. Students need to register themselves and go through the selection rounds to get a seat at the institute. Find below the steps to complete the ANA Group of Institutions admission process:
Step 1: Appear for the Accepted Entrance Exam

Since admissions are offered on an entrance basis, students must provide a valid score card of the accepted tests. For that, candidates need to appear for the accepted test mentioned above in the table.
Step 2: Apply Online

Students can visit the official website of the institute and start the application procedure by registering themselves and providing the specified information, such as personal details, educational qualifications, contact information, etc.
Step 3: Selection

The institute shortlists candidates on an entrance basis. The final selection is made based on the entrance exam score, followed by an institute-level interview. The interview is a rigorous process conducted to asses candidate's aptitude, leadership skills, etc. Detailed admission criteria can be obtained by visiting the official website of the institute.
Step 4: Seat Confirmation
Once an admission offer is made, selected students need to pay the ANA Group of Institutions fees to secure their spots at the institute.

faqs.question: Is the admission to MBA at ANA Group of Institution merit-based or entrance-based?
faqs.answer: ANA Group of Institutions MBA admissionis both merit- and entrance-based. For entrance-based admission, the institute accepts valid CUET PG scores. Moreover, for merit-based admission, the institute releases the merit on the basis of candidates' last qualifying examination. Before applying for the course, candidates must ensure that they complete the basic eligibility criteria that state applicants must complete their graduation with a minimum aggregate of 50% (45% for reserved category).

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for BTech course at ANA Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: ANA Group of Institutions offers five specialisations in the BTech course, namely, Computer Science Engineering with Data Science & AI,Civil Engineering,  Electronics and Communication Engineering,Mechanical Engineering, and Electrical Engineering. The total number of seats offered in these specialisation is 300. To get a seat in the BTech course, candidates are required to complete the basic eligibility criteria first, which state applicants must complete their Class 12 from the PCM stream with an aggregate of 50% (45% for reserved categories).

reviews.review_heading: Average college for activities.
reviews.review_text: Faculty, sports, and games are nil. No sports events during my study time. No faculty members from other branches teach students in the Bachelor of Technology. No practicals, no discussion sessions—only in college, teachers get students to write notes of the syllabus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of ANA Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are above average. Semi Wi-Fi zone is available on campus. Digital classrooms, 5 labs and 3 libraries are available. The hostel is okay, and the food is very good in both places. Medical facilities are good. Sports events are arranged every month.

reviews.review_heading: This College provide you a sufficient knowledge of your course.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, Wi-Fi facility is available, good quality of food is available, classrooms are fine, library is also good, books are also available related to the subjects, computer lab also good here we will learn about many courses like MS office any many courses.

reviews.review_heading: The worst college ever I have seen in my life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not so good but okay. There is no Wi-Fi for students. And they do not allow students to play and eat in canteen in free time. If they found you outside the class, then they fine you. And hostel is terrible. Food is okay but not nutritious.

reviews.review_heading: An average college for financially unstable students.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is an average hostel. The canteen is close to the pharmacy block of the college. Hostel food is good. The hostel is 700 meters away from the college. Hostel food is prepared in the college canteen and will be delivered to the hostel. Sports meet is very good here and has a good team in games.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MGM College of Engineering and Pharmaceutical Sciences.
reviews.review_text: Laboratory is available. Classrooms are available. It provides a decent library for students and staff members. Hostel facilities are good. The food served in the mess is good. Canteen is available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: This college is great for studies and provides good infrastructure and facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college with the best college experience.
reviews.review_text: The food served in a mess is average. Overall, it is average. Wi-Fi is not available for students. Labs and classrooms are good. It does not have huge medical facilities. And also, permission is only given up to 4:20 to be in the college compound. There are sports and arts days in the college. The hostel is providing good facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty, campus, placement, hostel facilities, and college are all excellent.

The hostel and food facilities are good and girls and boys have separate hostels. Canteen and mess facilities are available. For sports and games, they give them more priority.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities, and the quality of teaching is average.

It includes good classrooms, better library facilities with standard books to refer to, a proper curriculum to follow, and standard lab facilities with dedicated staff. The hostel facilities are good, being nearest to the college, with a clean building and properly assigned rooms for students, where each room has 1-3 students. college_info.college_name: St. Soldier Group of Institutions: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview:
Established in 1958, St. Soldier Group of Institutions is located in Jalandhar, Punjab. The institute offers courses like B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc. and M.Sc. These courses are offered in Full Time mode. A total of 52 courses offered by the Institute are available across streams such as Engineering, Science, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies, Accounting & Commerce and Law. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

At the UG and PG levels, St. Soldier Group of Institutions offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose offline courses, from streams like Engineering and Business & Management Studies. College offers B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. The St. Soldier Group of Institutions course fee ranges between INR 23,000 to 2,82,000.

Q. What is the intake for offered courses at St. Soldier Group of Institutions?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, St. Soldier Group of Institutions offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose offline courses, from streams like Engineering and Business & Management Studies. College offers B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. The St. Soldier Group of Institutions course fee ranges between INR 23,000 to 2,82,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: This is very good college for doing engineering. My experience in this college is too good.

review_content.Placements: The job fair is organised by the college every year. They also guide you on which company is best suits you for training. Many reputed companies are joined the job fair and placed the students from the campus. The companies also offer hood packages to the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities are provided like canteen hostel, mess and the infrastructure is too good. The library is also available in the college. The classrooms are neat and clean. The quality of food is good. Sports and games are also part of the organisation. Every year sports meet is organized.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure is not so good, placement companies doesn't give good salary.

review_content.Placements: 50-60% student placed 15000 to 30000 Pharmaceutical companies & hospitals or own work Food inspector, pharmacist, drugist & chemist. 20,0000 minimum annual 80,0000 Maximum 70-80% students were placed in top pharmacy companies like Himalaya & most student goes to abroad.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi not available for student in this college, infrastructure also not so good, classrooms are average, library is good & labs are also average. Food of mess is not so good mostly chappati are not baked properly, the food of canteen are average, sports & games In college is good & medical facilities of college average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The facilities and placements are very good on the campus.

review_content.Placements: Most of the companions visit the campus for placements, like MRF, Nexa, etc., in which, many candidates got selected. One of my friends got selected in MRF company with a salary package of around 5 LPA. I'm thankful to this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is in good condition like benches, tables, and examination halls. The classrooms are air-conditioned. Labs are also good. All the staff members cooperate with all of us. Buildings are in excellent condition, and the greenery on the campus keeps the atmosphere awesome.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good at certain aspects.

review_content.Placements: A good number of placement drives are conducted in the college. But, the companies that visit the college aren't humongous usually. They try to improvise it and make it grow like other colleges in the region. I have seen 3 placement drives in my tenure of 2 years.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are more spacious than any other college I have seen. Wooden desks and tables are provided for seating, which doesn't look low-class at all. The roads are macadamized. Wi-Fi facility is very limited. The canteen is classy. The library is very small compared to other facilities (or rooms) in the college. A gymnasium is available in every boys' hostel for free, though the low-quality equipment is present. The hostel warden is good and takes the responsibilities of the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of the good placements.

review_content.Placements: During placement time, lots of companies came to our institute and picked 40 to 50 students from every batch, so it is good and great. Mostly, developer role is offered by the company, so it is good for those students who have to become a developer. It is good for every student.
review_content.Infrastructure: Every class has Wi-Fi facility. There are proper seating arrangement and proper lighting condition. The A/C facilities are also provided and heater. The labs are good. Our college provides every facility for student and faculty, so there is no problem for students. There is a sports ground present. There are medical facilities also.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: My college is located behind NIT Jalandhar. It has all the facilities which are required for a complete college. I will describe below the pros and cons of my college. Pros: The college has good faculty members, an excellent student cafe and excellent classrooms, labs and festival programs. Cons: They cannot give proper knowledge for practical work and better placement options for their students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by St. Soldier Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 11 Jan 2022)
reviews.review_heading: This is very good college for doing engineering. My experience in this college is too good.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are provided like canteen hostel, mess and the infrastructure is too good. The library is also available in the college. The classrooms are neat and clean. The quality of food is good. Sports and games are also part of the organisation. Every year sports meet is organized.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is not so good, placement companies doesn't give good salary.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi not available for student in this college, infrastructure also not so good, classrooms are average, library is good & labs are also average. Food of mess is not so good mostly chappati are not baked properly, the food of canteen are average, sports & games In college is good & medical facilities of college average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2018Offered by St. Soldier Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 14 Jun 2018)
reviews.review_heading: The facilities and placements are very good on the campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is in good condition like benches, tables, and examination halls. The classrooms are air-conditioned. Labs are also good. All the staff members cooperate with all of us. Buildings are in excellent condition, and the greenery on the campus keeps the atmosphere awesome.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2018Offered by St. Soldier Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 5 May 2018)
reviews.review_heading: The college is good at certain aspects.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are more spacious than any other college I have seen. Wooden desks and tables are provided for seating, which doesn't look low-class at all. The roads are macadamized. Wi-Fi facility is very limited. The canteen is classy. The library is very small compared to other facilities (or rooms) in the college. A gymnasium is available in every boys' hostel for free, though the low-quality equipment is present. The hostel warden is good and takes the responsibilities of the students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2018Offered by St. Soldier Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 9 Feb 2018)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the good placements.
reviews.review_text: Every class has Wi-Fi facility. There are proper seating arrangement and proper lighting condition. The A/C facilities are also provided and heater. The labs are good. Our college provides every facility for student and faculty, so there is no problem for students. There is a sports ground present. There are medical facilities also.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2015Offered by St. Soldier Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 30 Mar 2016)
reviews.review_text:
My college is located behind NIT Jalandhar. It has all the facilities which are required for a complete college.  I will describe below the pros and cons of my college. Pros: The college has good faculty members, an excellent student cafe and excellent classrooms, labs and festival programs. 
Cons: They cannot give proper knowledge for practical work and better placement options for their students. My college is located behind NIT Jalandhar. It has all the facilities which are required for a complete college.  I will describe below the pros and cons of my college. Pros: The college has good faculty members, an excellent student cafe and excellent classrooms, labs and festival programs. 
Cons: They cannot give proper knowledge for practical work and better placement options for their students.

reviews.review_heading: Best infrastructure and education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is one of the best, with a free gym, free sports, judo, karate, swimming pool, and so on. There is free Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, a library in the hostel, and the best food with a proper diet for health. Medical services are also available in the hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by St. Soldier College Basti DanishmandanReviewed on 1 Apr 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Fully satisfied. Good college
reviews.review_text: Very good infrastructure. Wifi connection are very well.  Labs are very clean and full filled with instruments, computer. Classroom are on very well condition. A big library in all department. Hostel are in very well condition  . Quality Of food is good. A very huge canteen in campus. Medical facilities is 24*7  available. A very big ground, basketball and besminton ground. very good coaches are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2018Offered by St. Soldier Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 12 Dec 2017)
reviews.review_heading: Everything is up to the mark in our college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure. It has hi-tech labs. Good quality food is available in the canteen and hostel. The heating and cooling facilities are available in hostel rooms. Medical facilities are available in our college. We didn't face any problems in the college during our tenure.
